title: [VPlan] Use getSigned() for index in VectorEndPointer recipe
author: nikic
description:
The stride can be negative here, so we should use getSigned().

This avoids an assertion failure with https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/pull/171456. It also avoids a miscompile if the index is >64-bit, but I don't think that can happen in practice.

tests.test_body:
target triple = "i386-unknown-linux-gnu"

define void @test(ptr %dest, i32 %n) #0 {
entry:
  br label %loop

loop:                                             ; preds = %loop, %entry
  %iv = phi i32 [ %iv.next, %loop ], [ %n, %entry ]
  %iv.next = add i32 %iv, -1
  %gep = getelementptr i8, ptr %dest, i32 %iv.next
  store i8 0, ptr %gep, align 1
  %cmp = icmp eq i32 %iv, 0
  br i1 %cmp, label %exit, label %loop

exit:                                             ; preds = %loop
  ret void
}

attributes #0 = { "target-cpu"="pentium4" }
